Which one of the following is correct about the nature of information except_____________?
options: Information can exist in a liquid state
Information can exist in the gesture
Information can exist in a solid-state
Information only flows from source to receiver
Information Science.answer: Information only flows from source to receiver

Information Retrieval System.question: Which of the following steps of in the process of constructing indexing file are performed in the right order?
options: Tokenization, Stemming, Stop-word Removal, Thesaurus Construction
Stop-word Removal, Tokenization, Thesaurus Construction, Stemming
Tokenization, Stop-word Removal, Stemming, Thesaurus Construction
Stemming, Thesaurus Construction, Tokenization, Stop-word Removal
Information Retrieval System.answer: Tokenization, Stop-word Removal, Stemming, Thesaurus Construction

Information Retrieval System.question: One of the following statements is true about Zipf’s law in statistical properties of a text?
options: The numerical position of a word in a list sorted by decreasing frequency
Word significance is very useful for indexing
Concerns the size of the number of unique words in the corpus
Find documents relevant to an information need from a large document set
Information Retrieval System.answer: The numerical position of a word in a list sorted by decreasing frequency

Information Retrieval System.answer: Define a text database and Users reformulate query
